Event.Name: Emergency Import Triggered
Event.TriggerLabel: Battery manager triggered emergency grid import
Event.Description: Fires when the battery manager determines the battery will not reach dawn at the minimum SOC and initiates a grid import.

Event.Name: Grid Export Started
Event.Description: Fires when the battery manager begins exporting battery energy to the grid to prevent 100% SOC cap during solar generation.

Event.Name: Grid Export Stopped
Event.Description: Fires when grid export stops and the inverter returns to self-consumption mode.

Event.Name: VPP Event Announced
Event.Description: Fires when a new Axle VPP export event is scheduled (more than 30 minutes away).

Event.Name: VPP Event Started
Event.TriggerLabel: Axle VPP export event is now active
Event.Description: Fires when an Axle VPP export event becomes active. Battery manager suspends; Axle controls via Sigenergy cloud.

Event.Name: VPP Event Ended
Event.Description: Fires when an Axle VPP export event ends and battery manager control is restored.
